prompt: Create a high-end futuristic skincare advertisement poster in icy blue and white tones, vertical 2:3 composition. The scene features a translucent glass female bust in left profile with a low bun hairstyle, occupying the left two-thirds of the frame. Inside the transparent head, neck, and torso is a surreal miniature landscape of blue cliffs, glowing water, and multiple waterfalls, like a frozen digital sanctuary contained within the body. Add tiny suspended bubbles, glossy reflections, misty atmosphere, and soft aurora-like light streaks drifting diagonally across the image. On the right side, place a clean white cylindrical skincare bottle standing upright on a jagged translucent ice pedestal. The bottle label should read SECURE-IP and below it IP ADDRESS CLEANSER, with smaller technical cosmetic copy beneath in a minimal editorial layout. Set giant vertical glowing text along the far right edge reading DEEP CORE PURITY. Add 4 small infographic-style callouts in a sleek tech-beauty design: a top-right droplet icon with the heading “MOISTURE LOCK” and two short lines of tiny supporting text, a mid-right shield icon with the heading “IP PROTECTION” and three short lines of tiny supporting text, a lower-left headline block reading “PURE CONNECTION PURE CONFIDENCE” with 2 short lines of body copy, and a far-left small label reading “DATA STREAM PURIFIER” with a bracket line pointing toward the glass figure. Include a centered solid pale blue rectangular overlay covering part of the face and upper torso, as a flat opaque block. Lighting is ethereal, glossy, and premium, with strong bloom, frosted highlights, soft backlight, and luxury sci-fi cosmetic campaign styling. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 3D render, clean commercial poster design, minimal yet surreal, polished surfaces, cold luminous atmosphere.
